title: Uniswap v4 Core Whitepaper
why_it_matters: Primary protocol document explicitly describing hook-managed dynamic fees and volatility-shifting examples.

title: A Structural Model of Automated Market Making
why_it_matters: Empirical/structural evidence that volatility-sensitive AMM fees can outperform fixed fees.

title: Dynamic Fee for Reducing Impermanent Loss in Decentralized Exchanges
why_it_matters: Explicitly studies asymmetric adaptive fee mechanisms and reports improved LP outcomes versus fixed-fee baselines.
